title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
